creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
/usr/src/etc/login.conf has an entry for datasize-curr which I
	believe is a no-op.

	Another problem with the "news" entry is the filesize. I
	suspect this it's a big mistake to limit the filesize. For
	example, the history file on my freebsd netnews system is 290
	MB which is larger the 120 MB found in login.conf...

How-To-Repeat: 
	% more /usr/src/etc/login.conf
